title: Destiny
body:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/vRqtvypn/images/f81c76e9a25a0473f1e6ab22f89de61f34ebf2b5.png)
# About this Modpack
Destiny modpack turns your regular Minecraft into an **RPG game**: 

- Explore new **dungeons**, beautiful **biomes** and entire **cities** 🏯
- Find **rare loot** 🎁 
- Watch your **diet** by cooking delicious dishes 🍖
- Use an old **atlas** as a map 🗺️
- Create a **backpack** for your travels 💼
- Complete **quests**, hunt new exotic **animals** and more and more...
###  Hurry up! The _destiny_ of amazing world of Minecraft is only **in your hands**
